sources.name: VerbNet
sources.planned_use: Map verb lemmas and prepositions to coarse semantic roles and frame preferences.

sources.name: FrameNet
sources.planned_use: Refine event/frame labels and valence patterns for PP roles.

sources.name: SemLink
sources.planned_use: Bridge VerbNet classes and FrameNet/PropBank role labels.

sources.name: WordNet
sources.planned_use: Provide noun-type backoff classes when the local technical lexicon has no exact match.

sources.name: Google Developer Documentation Style Guide Word List
sources.planned_use: Seed preferred technical terminology and substitution candidates.

sources.name: Microsoft Writing Style Guide
sources.planned_use: Guide preferred technical terminology and consistency rules.

sources.name: Red Hat Supplementary Style Guide
sources.planned_use: Seed technical glossary entries and preferred wording for docs.

sources.name: Vale
sources.planned_use: Share the same preferred and discouraged terminology with prose linting.
